data.name: The Rescue of Mermaids
data.detailed_description:
Story

In The Rescue of Mermaids, you play Garry, a rare human-looking creature who can become into octopus when aroused (eromorph). Garry has three mermaid companions accompanying him on his journey to find a new planet to call home, but when they finally find an ideal planet, the mermaids end up being kidnapped. Now he needs to figure out how to rescue them and ensure peace and security for his lineage.

System

The game is a 2d side scrolling platform with bomberman-like battle, the purpose of the game is to rescue three mermaids wherever they are and guarantee peace for their lineage of octopus-men.

  • Monster Girls

  • Animated CG

  • Library to check out the animations anytime

  • 10 Stages

  • 1 Endings

  • And many secrets in the depths of the ocean

data.short_description: Travel through the depths of the ocean with Garry the octopus-man and save your mermaids.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8/8.1, 10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 128MB of video memory, Shader Model 2.0+ capability
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8/8.1, 10
  • 處理器: 3 Ghz dual-core
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 256MB of video memory, Shader Model 2.0+ capability
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
